implementationSummary: Completed issue #413 surface compositions: #413-A shipped Card/Dialog/Popover; #413-B added keyboard-navigable Form (TextField, PasswordField, OtpField, FormSubmit composing Button) and Table (sortable headers, arrow-key row nav, empty state, responsive card collapse) with theme-token CSS, Vietnamese copy, Vitest interaction coverage, barrel exports in index.ts, MODULE.md docs, and import-boundary proof for packages/ui and apps/demo.
assumptions: Workflow/settings form layouts beyond labelled field primitives are deferred to destination screen issues.
Table responsive collapse uses CSS data-label stacking rather than duplicating Card markup per row.
risks: index.ts and styles.css append-only sections may need careful merge if #414 lands concurrently.
